mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video_watch_progress(user_id,resource_id,`current_time`,total_duration,watch_percentage,last_watch_time) VALUES(#{userId},#{resourceId},#{currentTime},#{totalDuration},#{watchPercentage},#{lastWatchTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `current_time` = VALUES(`current_time`), total_duration = VALUES(total_duration), watch_percentage = VALUES(watch_percentage), last_watch_time = VALUES(last_watch_time), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE video_watch_progress SET `current_time` = #{currentTime}, total_duration = #{totalDuration}, watch_percentage = #{watchPercentage}, last_watch_time = #{lastWatchTime}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND resource_id = #{resourceId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM video_watch_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND resource_id = #{resourceId}
